hyperedges.label: Request Data Flow Pipeline
hyperedges.description: End-to-end request flow: Server Component -> query function -> fetchGraphQL -> WPGraphQL endpoint -> ISR-cached static HTML

hyperedges.label: WordPress Plugin Stack
hyperedges.description: The WordPress CMS layer composed of three key plugins enabling headless content delivery

hyperedges.label: ACF Field Addition Pipeline
hyperedges.description: 5-step workflow for adding new ACF fields: WPGraphQL exposure -> fragment update -> type update -> component usage -> cache evaluation

nodes.label: Blog Mobility Brasil
nodes.description: Headless Next.js + WordPress blog project for Mobility Brasil

nodes.label: Next.js 16
nodes.description: Front-end framework using App Router

nodes.label: React 19
nodes.description: UI library used with Next.js 16

nodes.label: TypeScript Strict
nodes.description: Strict TypeScript mode; 'any' is prohibited, use 'unknown' + narrowing

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v4
nodes.description: Styling framework; no tailwind.config.js, tokens defined via @theme in app/globals.css

nodes.label: WordPress Headless CMS
nodes.description: Content management system used headlessly via WPGraphQL + ACF PRO + Yoast SEO

nodes.label: WPGraphQL
nodes.description: WordPress plugin exposing GraphQL API for headless content fetching

nodes.label: ACF PRO
nodes.description: Advanced Custom Fields PRO; fields must be exposed in WPGraphQL with graphql_field_name

nodes.label: Yoast SEO
nodes.description: SEO plugin for WordPress; data consumed via GraphQL fragments for metadata generation

nodes.label: fetchGraphQL
nodes.description: Core data-fetching function in lib/wordpress.ts; uses native fetch with Next.js cache tags and revalidation

nodes.label: lib/graphql/queries/
nodes.description: GraphQL query operations organized by entity (posts, post, categories)

nodes.label: lib/graphql/fragments/
nodes.description: Reusable GraphQL fragments (SEO, postFields)

nodes.label: App Router
nodes.description: Next.js routing paradigm; pages in app/ directory with layout.tsx, page.tsx, and dynamic routes

nodes.label: ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration)
nodes.description: Caching strategy using tag-based revalidation with 1h fallback; no cache: no-store except dynamic routes

nodes.label: Server Components
nodes.description: Default rendering mode; pages, layouts, and data-reading components are Server Components with async/await

nodes.label: Client Components
nodes.description: Used only for state, effects, DOM events, or browser APIs; kept small at leaf nodes

nodes.label: Cache Tags Convention
nodes.description: Tag-based cache invalidation: posts, post:{slug}, categories, category:{slug}

nodes.label: /api/revalidate Webhook
nodes.description: ISR revalidation webhook endpoint; not yet implemented, triggered by WordPress ACF/WP webhooks

nodes.label: Vercel Hosting
nodes.description: Hosting platform; preview deploys per branch, production from main

nodes.label: generateStaticParams
nodes.description: Used in [category]/[slug]/page.tsx to pre-render published posts at build time with dynamicParams fallback

nodes.label: generateMetadata
nodes.description: Generates <title>, OpenGraph, and canonical from Yoast SEO data

nodes.label: next/image
nodes.description: Mandatory for WordPress images; requires width, height (or fill), and alt

nodes.label: Naming Conventions
nodes.description: PascalCase for components/types, camelCase for utils, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for constants/queries, kebab-case for cache tags

nodes.label: app/globals.css
nodes.description: Global CSS file containing Tailwind v4 @theme token definitions

nodes.label: lib/mocks/
nodes.description: Temporary typed mock data fallbacks; marked with // TEMP MOCK comment

nodes.label: ACF Field Addition Workflow
nodes.description: 5-step process: expose in WPGraphQL -> add to fragment -> update type -> use in component -> evaluate cache impact

nodes.label: Request Data Flow
nodes.description: 4-step flow: Server Component -> query function -> fetchGraphQL -> WordPress endpoint -> typed result -> static HTML (ISR)

nodes.label: No Apollo Client Rationale
nodes.description: Decision to use native fetch instead of Apollo Client; leverages Next.js Data Cache + revalidateTag for granular invalidation

nodes.label: Client Component Minimization Rationale
nodes.description: Client Components are kept small and at leaf nodes to maximize Server Component benefits and reduce client JS

nodes.label: Next.js Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.description: AGENTS.md warns that this Next.js version has breaking changes; read guides in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before coding

nodes.label: Geist Font
nodes.description: Font family loaded via next/font for automatic optimization

nodes.label: Pending: sitemap.ts / robots.ts
nodes.description: SEO phase deliverable; not yet implemented

nodes.label: Pending: Figma Design System
nodes.description: Phase 2 deliverable; Figma design system to replace current utility-class-only approach

hyperedges.description: End-to-end request flow: Server Component -> query function -> fetchGraphQL -> WPGraphQL endpoint -> ISR-cached static HTML
